name: free-deepseek-api
description: OpenAI-compatible local API proxy for DeepSeek Web chat

scripts.studio:build: npm --prefix dashboard ci && npm --prefix dashboard run build
scripts.studio:e2e: npm run studio:build && npm --prefix dashboard run e2e
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run studio:build && npm run audit
scripts.test: node --check server.js && node --check studio-server.js && node --check scripts/auth.js && node --check scripts/auth_import.js && node --check scripts/doctor.js && node --check scripts/deepseek_chrome_auth.js && node --check scripts/probe_deepseek_models.js && node --check scripts/check-docs.js && node --check scripts/release-check.js && node --check client.js && node --check agent.js && node --check lib/agent-core.js && node --check lib/project-index.js && node --check lib/server-config.js && node --check lib/http-guard.js && node --check lib/session-store.js && node --check lib/api-routes.js && node --check lib/logger.js && node --check lib/git-service.js && node --check lib/project-registry.js && node --check scripts/live_agentic_smoke_tests.mjs && node scripts/check-docs.js && node --test tests/unit.test.js tests/integration.test.js
